summary: I’m Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Program Manager who thrives on driving {prog|continuous improvement} through data analysis, developing {prog|programs} grounded in insights, and {cross|collaborating with stakeholders} for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

items.text: Force Multiply: Make everyone more effective by removing blockers, {prog|streamlining processes}, and ensuring meetings are decisive and actionable.
items.reason: InGenius #1: "Streamlined cross-functional processes and built digital resources for 70+ staff via AI tools"

items.text: Drive Program Strategy & Execution: Translate concepts into rigorous {prog|project charters}. Define the "what, why, and how," manage the timeline, and ensure the team crosses the finish line.
Master Change Management: Design {change|communication plans}, messaging, and {change|adoption strategies} to ensure our distributed workforce embraces the changes you implement.

items.text: Continuously Improve: Always thinking of ways to improve things while delivering on programs and projects.
Tech & Data Savviness: Comfortable with {tools|Monday.com}, {tools|Jira}. Familiarity with HR systems ({tools|Workday}, {tools|Greenhouse}) is a bonus.

items.text: High Agency & Accountability: You are a "driver", not a passenger. Track, prioritize, and drive projects without needing to be reminded.
